data.body: 4e9d plan PASS+signed after 9 rounds (v8b; earlier INDETERMINATE was API transient). Definitive design: 4 LOCAL composer sites (append_event/txn/delete/compact) + inbound-reconciler explicitly scoped out (external Jira author = 264f/2f13). CLAIMED 4e9d. Folding non-blocking advisories into implementer brief: compact.py derives repo_root from tracker inline (os.path.dirname(realpath(tracker)), like compact.py:331) - no signature churn; add _reset_attribution_cache() test helper; git timeout=5s; per-entry reduced-output tests for comment/revert/signature. Beginning held-out TDD.
